name: New Source Request

**Site name:**

**Site URL:**

**Example series page URL:**
<!-- e.g. https://somesite.com/manga/{manga_name} -->

**Example chapter URL:**
<!-- e.g. https://somesite.com/manga/{manga_name}/chapter/1 -->

**How is the slug formed?**
<!-- describe how the manga title maps to the URL, e.g. lowercase, spaces→hyphens, special chars stripped etc. -->

**Does it require a unique ID per manga** (i.e. can't be derived from the title alone)?
- [ ] Yes - needs a manual ID
- [ ] No - title alone is enough
